---
title: "Słaba zbieżność miar probabilistycznych"
description: "semestr letni 2022/2023"
semester: "2025/2026"
image: "SZMP.png"
---

Cwiczenia: Czwartki 8:15-10:00 sala 604,

Wykład: piątki 10:15-12:00 sala 601

Kolokwium: 12.05

<a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FgdmEk6YkXhPGbqFuNQfJfh77L7hfiwz/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Sylabus</span></a>

## Notatki do wykładu

  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1wYaLH39VoghW2dILEXNzvHTwiAyAjD56/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 1: Propaganda</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1AmTtRQDBVOHYuP7ODT24prlQLuYGsAA5/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 2: Prawdopodobieństwa na przestrzeniach metrycznych</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JRmwGz1maN3RMhSPAXYTab1shmfn0eDq/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 3: Słaba zbieżność (3.03)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZWUo_ix1l3nTZ2tkudeeI0uTIg8bcMLp/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 4: Elementy losowe (10.03)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-n794ftBn2XoX_pKPPgWTo7sdz5n6Onz/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 5: Losowe permutacje (17.03)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1mTABHDWQt4ak9JpRqD9KokhIHqERCTW0/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 6: Losowe funkcje ciągłe (24.03)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fpoqXpqpd4s2iikA0HJNHMKz7WKPkXU5/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 7: Miara Wienera (31.03)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JvMC7bWbwBW3KckNJZAu07w3FoPdC0K7/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 8: Twierdzenie Donskera (14.04)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1eCt-kZkgNTa55mYCW02VVlv5LNX0eccV/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 9: Procesy punktowe (21.04)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1VS3cmLcmib53yYZxLg_f4vIMvoao5Eq4/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 10: Procesy Poissona (28.04)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/18wCCVFJqIrPt2CbfEp0fxKr5_P0RYM87/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 11: Zbieżność procesów punktowych (5.05)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1dVlOF78eViRk2PytG1fnehz5k8pTdhTq/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 12: Rozkłady stabilne</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1trUjb14WvxYPiYTGZiNzvQzz7t96Ye9d/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 13: Przestrzeń Skorochoda</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/13sdfw3dEn6yizoYcQBWLD6Qz3sRyK_fM/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 14: Topologia Skorochoda (3.06)</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1BvAzdQbfXA_eSr6EWBJiWR8qG6Ku7Xn5/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wykład 15: Losowe funkcje cadlag (7.06)</span></a>
  
## Listy zadań
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JCFVFzlVKmaMjE64poOAPwc35QsN2mAY/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Słaba zbieżność na prostej</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1qPjbSgLCm27JQlCFm9wpfRzfEBI9kiX0/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Przestrzenie metryczne</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1AdaRftS2gMR9YxI89NC-96_sxvEhE1hf/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Prawdopodobieństwa na przestrzeniach metrycznych</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1iyERT69pd40sq3HqtMYwJOot5SMEIBSx/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Słaba zbieżność</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pX0rQcRC0zecH8sIL1M8IW2f1UGi-4Zt/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Ciągi losowe</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1uJh62XKLNLrt9SEKPylPrQ9Xur-l2gdE/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Losowe partycje</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1VOgpC0wwdWww0nPMJRTYTbAeSU3cz4K1/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wzór Camerona-Martina</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1oNtOlzz28kh7JbDKZzuzdakeYsgScpCS/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Losowe funkcje ciągłe</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1um4-0976EKsMEOUmP360HFo9SP_YH4Zb/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Procesy punktowe</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/16oesbodnuof1WSqjpVG-MVO-XNDcCtNW/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Zbieżność procesów punktowych</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ESD4_Cl6bb9Q5NuHOCZfCRrydBZ1-vSz/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Przestrzeń Skorochoda</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Ju1AWDlaenjP8vIM93GDVerjnwuiJrms/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Losowe funkcje cadlag</span></a>
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Vv3zKO4E6l_llS2rZyyMAU76TV9JAafQ/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Zadania egzaminacyjne</span></a>
  
## Wizualizacje

<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, Donsker&#39;s Invariance Principle" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/vrXJ_XKQjAI?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1eznEKe3TB3Qladx4oYpBgY5azm645ckjp8wGS1lPqROcIAG3Hv3Ts2KGvS3zvqQJ552ce3_GjTduNd1nKhjjrJa-D8SMoQXmzkPYmfIwDQl5N-SivSj1K93PI-zRotNIkj-erd3UFJMHh4md8eWxUM8K2Bi-_Y3VUvdJEfkL4aOS%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpcBAXH1ezkk3W-L68DxTg3C0rXGhXVScMc4lu02yhbVx68sY_xUYt_IgFAO214rEdbsR00Uu13jI5sG9uMOMo-gxKzCWlMaHAy7AEgWfDvvOhR8OMHKYALTcDrzbStN9FJqa1ktv5uX4Du2Gq95Y4GF636xFIdaHtOejK_czwgojCT9lijxGuRjdqPqiMFVP0iZeI40uTFFwg%3D%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, Point process convergence" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Z870qhnl10I?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1ezkC5NpNb3hOPIN7hbT-5kdkTVX8VmDJePxoXWowfqxrIalPn6q5cjamyX3mTgijK-M7U_gd6k0BX5DRVr7moSVmRjqiyIOIJPdTv_ynzOMzvb2VAoOCWyjQBiDTeJoE9Qf7qLUtg3-DJFclec07DDlmnASZTI6o_wEF1utWmFC6%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpgBAXH1ezlJOrGFru1VK5qekji2_pM7KWITfnUQ2IYSIYVverlccA63gFkuwNAEry2XR4XUQIp3ncEuE7tsGOByE0T0lOyH9e4NXtpxIS7dG2s_zrrlIuWxjfSIfacu32T26AOT6rzjD98OXoIZ5mlidPCUdNPPJ2B6IHm9ez2UF7_1jXJlxEYz0614pmQUKp-YgZJDm3ayroU%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, Weak onvergence of partial sum processes to (pure jump) Lévy processes" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/_JJPK74JOyM?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1ezkcw1TFP3p0WP5cMVgxGFp3apURADCsGhozxOb0bpP1MJNvDBEwut2HnlSLsFVeo1c1fnY_McSnoFifx0CMo9PlAJxNViyGuoQi4c6s7QGluuhwCnI1l-taebPwz4usJi__LX4nA8ceb6AVyObpbOwsMQgitq7WoaTOkVJudXgl%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpgBAXH1ezlXU134fBTa08oFQHZvZO1y-un0Q4XUG1gnzUoNIFU8d-hQnXABslp9AyqW65EgV-pTnBAjKhVyTmerfLFzC0RDqV6x95GdUOMYYQ4dGHz-RGNauB-PgEgjasyOdfMofeYECwGkeM8TIAq6-pIvfF4dKskggWZ-4D5fUc6IRxbiyAf92iEMtwBtCdr-QzjfVNpFpUs%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, Weak onvergence of partial sum processes to (pure jump) Lévy processes II" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/n7W4YJYvAlc?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1ezkn9U6J6qlySbwIEHKR7o6_A5VuN7l6lcJ6vW2uAeFQfmMAUykYARjnzzdBfI0VyIbprVk2hxvAlWh7t1Vb8dINzwKKgFySPINuh9CGDxxqY6FqGzQhCBFP7UtZ5x5RS937o417JqASGk3gYwQMftyTWEBEb5rNl-008Tc9cMTi%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpcBAXH1ezl-2i-0NScnNwfI-TlyOWb5dQ7GkWrCjPvGj65NTI0qFq83-N9q7rh2GWxPoJSST7sLzzaPmF15lxc8tGzxeEUUylHx_yeOyaWbROGsB3Jth7tpCCW67NUKRvd2o16NASN5FvbpIHIwwx3w6g-73m71rs2OgG7yo6JlyD13hOtJnk7W0dDC_ONbKJsvcrwb7935-g%3D%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, Weak onvergence of partial sum processes to (pure jump) Lévy processes III" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/xu8LDU6305M?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1ezlayQ91SVWtVLQDgtknT_gBvHbPhL7MRD_EpZOghvnWJcGW6aEYUiE_rmjeZ1nPrpOQUWTH5EK2ae_YwVrF7hwCq0SpbLWm4ZewwxONS8Ha9BdV5ye865PBOgdSY1WtrQLXJcwMSdaNhVm6Gd7uapgIMliLKUBfvrQrczsiA0Et%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpgBAXH1ezkn2IRrw0dBNQzhJfw3r5PUOGS1GSkAy4XNri5HuzUyV3AmpbXPK1CQpClTyUa6Th32NL-1JCr1TehAlcqkAlGydf8MuVGUYtmqBPMvpuz04FtqzT99n0Zd3My8d8x2C4f_bdq_V95klk-RtY9WznbVqNgSCWcZVwWq9Ynj3g_UxQAtImekWedmCGV2L_0Jy8wJ6bs%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>
